name: Local GPU Bridge — Borrow the Owner's Consumer GPU (Inference, Image-Gen, Training)
description: Reverse-SSH bridge so an always-on CPU server borrows a consumer GPU at home: restricted tunnel-only user, one-script installer, antifragile failover (GPU can only ADD speed), local image-gen via sd-server, WDDM commit-limit trap, and the local-training pattern.
author: Tiranyx
